Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\("@prisma/client"\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{const prodId="b60496ee-9fda-46d0-b5e9-0590e83b498c";const prod=await p.product.findUnique\({where:{id:prodId},select:{currentStock:true,productionZoneStock:true,name:true}}\);console.log\("PRODUCTO:",JSON.stringify\(prod\)\);const totalFLS=await p.finishedLotStock.aggregate\({where:{productId:prodId,currentQuantity:{gt:0}},_sum:{currentQuantity:true}}\);console.log\("Total en finishedLotStock \(con stock\):",totalFLS._sum.currentQuantity\);const totalML=await p.materialLot.aggregate\({where:{productId:prodId,currentQuantity:{gt:0}},_sum:{currentQuantity:true}}\);console.log\("Total en materialLot \(con stock\):",totalML._sum.currentQuantity\);console.log\("Sin asignar:",prod.currentStock-\(totalFLS._sum.currentQuantity||0\)-\(totalML._sum.currentQuantity||0\)\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\("@prisma/client"\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{const batches=await p.productionBatch.findMany\({where:{flavor:{contains:"liquimon",mode:"insensitive"}},orderBy:{createdAt:"desc"},take:10,select:{id:true,batchNumber:true,flavor:true,status:true,scheduledStart:true,batchOutputTargets:{select:{productId:true,plannedUnits:true,approvedUnits:true,product:{select:{name:true,size:true}}}}}}\);for\(const b of batches\){console.log\(b.batchNumber,b.status,b.scheduledStart?.toISOString\(\)?.slice\(0,10\)\);for\(const t of b.batchOutputTargets\){console.log\("  ",t.product?.name,t.product?.size,"planned:",t.plannedUnits,"approved:",t.approvedUnits\);}}await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\("@prisma/client"\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{const batches=await p.productionBatch.findMany\({where:{flavor:{contains:"liquimon",mode:"insensitive"}},orderBy:{createdAt:"desc"},take:10,select:{id:true,batchNumber:true,flavor:true,status:true,scheduledStart:true,outputTargets:{select:{productId:true,plannedUnits:true,approvedUnits:true,product:{select:{name:true,size:true}}}}}}\);for\(const b of batches\){console.log\(b.batchNumber,b.status,b.scheduledStart?.toISOString\(\)?.slice\(0,10\)\);for\(const t of b.outputTargets\){console.log\("  ",t.product?.name,t.product?.size,"planned:",t.plannedUnits,"approved:",t.approvedUnits\);}}await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('processType:', d.get\('processType',{}\).get\('code'\)\); print\('template:', d.get\('template',{}\).get\('templateCode'\) if d.get\('template'\) else 'None'\); print\('stageName:', d.get\('stageName'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('processType:', d.get\('processType',{}\).get\('code'\)\) print\('template:', d.get\('template',{}\).get\('templateCode'\) if d.get\('template'\) else 'None'\) print\('stageName:', d.get\('stageName'\)\) print\('items count:', len\(d.get\('items',[]\)\)\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\)[:5]: print\(f' item: {i.get\(\\"component\\",{}\).get\(\\"name\\"\)}, planned: {i.get\(\\"plannedQuantity\\"\)}, unit: {i.get\(\\"unit\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\): print\(f' item: {i.get\(\\"component\\",{}\).get\(\\"name\\"\)}, planned: {i.get\(\\"plannedQuantity\\"\)}, unit: {i.get\(\\"unit\\"\)}, actual: {i.get\(\\"actualQuantity\\"\)}, lot: {i.get\(\\"lotNumber\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('processType:', d.get\('processType',{}\).get\('code'\)\) print\('template:', d.get\('template',{}\).get\('templateCode'\) if d.get\('template'\) else 'None'\) print\('product:', d.get\('product',{}\).get\('name'\) if d.get\('product'\) else 'None'\) print\('stageName:', d.get\('stageName'\)\) print\('status:', d.get\('status'\)\) pp = d.get\('processParameters'\) or {} print\('processParameters keys:', list\(pp.keys\(\)\) if pp else 'None'\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\): print\(f' item id={i.get\(\\"id\\"\)}: {i.get\(\\"component\\",{}\).get\(\\"name\\"\)}, planned={i.get\(\\"plannedQuantity\\"\)}, unit={i.get\(\\"unit\\"\)}, actual={i.get\(\\"actualQuantity\\"\)}, lot={i.get\(\\"lotNumber\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) pp = d.get\('processParameters'\) or {} ls = pp.get\('lot_selections', {}\) for item_id, lots in ls.items\(\): print\(f'item {item_id}:'\) if isinstance\(lots, list\): for l in lots: print\(f' lot={l.get\(\\"lot\\"\)}, qty={l.get\(\\"qty\\"\)}, type={type\(l.get\(\\"qty\\"\)\).__name__}'\) else: print\(f' value: {lots}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json batches = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for b in \(batches if isinstance\(batches, list\) else batches.get\('batches',[]\)\): if 'ICE' in \(b.get\('lotNumber',''\) or ''\).upper\(\) or 'ICE' in \(b.get\('product',{}\).get\('name',''\) or ''\).upper\(\): print\(f'batch id={b.get\(\\"id\\"\)}, lot={b.get\(\\"lotNumber\\"\)}, product={b.get\(\\"product\\",{}\).get\(\\"name\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json batches = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(batches, dict\): batches = batches.get\('batches', []\) for b in batches: lot = b.get\('lotNumber',''\) if 'INVERTIDA-FRU' in lot.upper\(\): print\(f'batch id={b.get\(\\"id\\"\)}, lot={lot}, status={b.get\(\\"status\\"\)}'\) for n in b.get\('assemblyNotes', b.get\('notes', []\)\): print\(f' note {n.get\(\\"id\\"\)[:8]}... stage={n.get\(\\"stageName\\"\)}, process={n.get\(\\"processType\\",{}\).get\(\\"code\\"\) if isinstance\(n.get\(\\"processType\\"\),dict\) else n.get\(\\"processType\\"\)}, status={n.get\(\\"status\\"\)}, order={n.get\(\\"stageOrder\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) batches = data if isinstance\(data, list\) else data.get\('batches', data.get\('data', []\)\) for b in batches: lot = b.get\('lotNumber',''\) if 'FRU' in lot.upper\(\) or 'INVERTIDA' in lot.upper\(\): print\(f'batch id={b.get\(\\"id\\"\)}, lot={lot}'\) notes = b.get\('assemblyNotes', b.get\('notes', []\)\) for n in notes: pt = n.get\('processType'\) code = pt.get\('code'\) if isinstance\(pt, dict\) else pt print\(f' note {n.get\(\\"id\\"\)[:8]}... stage=\\"{n.get\(\\"stageName\\"\)}\\", process={code}, status={n.get\(\\"status\\"\)}, order={n.get\(\\"stageOrder\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Batches: {d.get\(\\"totalBatches\\"\)}, Flavors: {d.get\(\\"totalFlavors\\"\)}, Materials: {len\(d.get\(\\"materials\\",[]\)\)}'\); [print\(f'  {m[\\"name\\"][:40]:40} need={m[\\"needed\\"]:>10} stock={m[\\"stock\\"]:>10} deficit={m[\\"deficit\\"]:>10} {m[\\"status\\"]}'\) for m in d.get\('materials',[]\)[:10]]")
